_what: Audited reachable dialogue payloads that legitimately stay Japanese (staff credits, layout-locked tutorial headers, scream onomatopoeia, non-dialogue data the static reachability walk over-approximates into). Keys are the raw payload bytes in hex; values describe why each is exempt. Used by gate_untranslated_dialogue.

allow.01010101010cf4b531f4150d: tutorial section header 『分解と改造』 (leading-0x01 layout-locked; intended ZH 改造)
allow.010101010cf19b37f03b0d: tutorial section header 『ユニットの捕獲』 (leading-0x01 layout-locked; intended ZH 捕获)
allow.010101010cf626f01f31f0360d: tutorial section header 『間接攻撃と散開』 (leading-0x01 layout-locked; ZH all-atlas exceeds the dict-compressed JP byte budget and leading-0x01 blocks cannot be grown under COMBAT_SAFE; intended ZH 间接散开 noted in regression_test.TUTORIAL_HEADER_ALLOW)
allow.0101010cf25bf4ca31f341f4ca0d: tutorial section header 『勝利条件と敗北条件』 (leading-0x01 layout-locked; intended ZH 胜负条件)
allow.0101010cfb1f31f82e34f0ab2f0d: tutorial section header 『補給と回復について』 (leading-0x01 layout-locked; intended ZH 补给与回复)
allow.01010cf0ed31f0edf6380d: tutorial section header 『指揮と指揮範囲』 (leading-0x01 layout-locked; intended ZH 指挥范围)
